change.final_action: Rejected and code/test changes reverted after primary prompt verifier failed.
change.summary: Candidate lowered only the auto-tuned mid-context MoE prefill chunk from 1024 to 512 rows; linear attention stayed 1024 and full-attention query/post/RoPE stayed 4096/1024/1024.

checks.name: primary gate
checks.result: Stable IDs 220/570 and flat memory; candidate primary min decode 115.116651 tok/s.

checks.name: prompt verifier
checks.result: Both primary prefill medians regressed sharply versus the retained decode-policy-cache baseline (512/128 1958.536 -> 1892.253 tok/s; 4K/128 2292.684 -> 2121.682 tok/s), while decode was flat/small mixed.

commands.guard: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_t16_repack.py tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_t16_selected_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_q6_k_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_gemv_decode_dispatch.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_compact_moe_gemv_routing.py -q

notes: The 128K/128 final promotion check was not run because the primary prompt verifier failed.
This complements the earlier rejected MoE-only 2048 probe; both smaller and larger mid-context MoE chunks are no-hold for the primary gate.
